supervisor.reason: The workflow guidance is validated, and commit instructions now cover ignored `.dev` files plus stored-message verification.

bootstrap.goal: Harden dormammu for multi-session execution without shared-state races in the root .dev view.

tasks.resume_checkpoint: Resume from docs follow-up and any extra validation gaps around the new no-mirror multi-session model, keeping the `test_authoring` workflow stage aligned across machine and operator state.
tasks.next_pending_task: Refresh tests, operator docs, and `.dev` guidance for the no-mirror multi-session model

items.text: Re-open planning for the Phase 7 multi-session hardening slice and align `.dev` state with the new goal
Capture the design decision that per-session state lives only under `.dev/sessions/<session_id>/`
Refactor state writes so session runs never mirror `DASHBOARD.md`, `TASKS.md`, `session.json`, or `workflow_state.json` back into root `.dev`
Redefine root `.dev` as an index layer with active/default session pointers and multi-session summaries
Update CLI and recovery flows so commands resolve an explicit session target before reading or writing state
Add the dedicated `test_authoring` workflow skill and route repository guidance through it
Refresh tests, operator docs, and `.dev` guidance for the no-mirror multi-session model

next_action: Finalize the amended workflow-guidance commit, then continue any remaining docs follow-up as a separate scope.
notes: Treat this file as machine truth and keep Markdown synchronized.
The current mirror-based active root view is convenient for single-session use but unsafe under concurrent multi-session writes.
The chosen Phase 7 direction keeps session documents and machine truth under `.dev/sessions/<session_id>/` only.
Root `.dev` now acts as a pointer and index layer instead of copied session state.
Validation passed through targeted unit tests covering state repository, CLI, loop runner, supervisor, and CLI adapter behavior.
Repository workflow guidance now includes a dedicated `test_authoring` phase between design and executed validation.
Commit guidance now explains how to stage ignored `.dev` files and verify the stored commit message text.

latest_commit.summary: Refine workflow and commit guidance for test authoring
